rows.label: qev025801_MSG0001
rows.name:
Why must I believe in an invisible
entity just to get some water?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0002
rows.name:
How rude...! Are you insulting
our God of Miracles?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0003
rows.name:
Insult or not, what feelings I hold
toward an entity that doesn't exist
is my, Staccata's, own freedom.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0004
rows.name:
If you just give me a little bit of the
water you're letting everyone drink,
I, Staccata, will leave this place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0005
rows.name:
How brazen... However, our god dictates
that even to someone like you, we
may share the "Miracle Water."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0006
rows.name:
If you refuse to join the faith, please
hand over an Assassin Springtail.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0007
rows.name:
An Assassin Springtail is
impossible. Stop being so
stingy and hand over the water![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0008
rows.name:
I have preached our teachings to
many Ma-non, but I have never met
someone like you... before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Maluttet. Please send
this person away somewhere![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0010
rows.name:
I'm sorry, please leave. Only
those who believe in the God of
Miracles may enter our church...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0011
rows.name:
It seems you do not possess that
qualification. As a fellow Ma-non,
I am very disappointed in you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0012
rows.name:
You... you saw that exchange
just now, didn't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0013
rows.name:
Do you also believe a God of Miracles
exists, like that woman says?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev025801_SEL0011
rows.name: Say that you certainly feel the existence of the God of Miracles.

rows.label: qev025801_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev025801_SEL0021
rows.name: Dismiss it, saying such a thing doesn't exist.

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0014
rows.name:
It's not particularly strange
for a deeply religious Earthling
to think so, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0015
rows.name:
For even the Ma-non, who are
seekers of science, to believe it
is a ridiculous story, isn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0016
rows.name:
Lately, Ma-non who have been infected by an epidemic
are joining the faith in droves, claiming that
drinking this church's water cures their illness...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0017
rows.name:
You seem to be a rational person. I,
Staccata, agree with your opinion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0018
rows.name:
However, lately, Ma-non who have been infected by an
epidemic are joining the faith in droves, claiming that
drinking this church's water cures their illness...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0019
rows.name: I will be honest with you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0020
rows.name:
Staccata believes that they are the
ones causing the epidemic among the
Ma-non to gather believers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0021
rows.name:
If that assumption is correct...
As a physician, I cannot simply
overlook this massive incident![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0022
rows.name:
If I can just get my hands on the "Miracle
Water," I can analyze its components and
grab them by their tails, can't I.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0023
rows.name:
Don't you find this God of Miracles crowd
suspicious? Well? Won't you help me
expose Fraisie's conspiracy together?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0024
rows.name:
Then please go acquire the Assassin
Springtail that Fraisie demanded.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0025
rows.name:
In the meantime, Staccata
will go investigate the Biahno
Water Purification Plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0026
rows.name:
The epidemic spread among the Ma-non right
after that purification plant was built...
I am certain I will find something![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0027
rows.name:
Assassin Springtail... That is a very
dangerous insect that carries a potent
poison in its body, isn't it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0028
rows.name:
What in the world do they
plan to use that for?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0029
rows.name:
...Well, just please go get
it anyway. I will investigate
the water at Biahno Lake.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0030
rows.name:
Phew... What in the world
were those monsters?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0031
rows.name:
On my way to Biahno Lake, I was chased around by a
bunch of monsters and ended up running back here.
This planet truly is a dangerous place, isn't it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_JNK0030
rows.name: Warn

rows.label: qev025801_SEL0031
rows.name: Lecture him that going outside without an escort is reckless.

rows.label: qev025801_JNK0040
rows.name: Worry

rows.label: qev025801_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask if he is hurt.

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0032
rows.name:
I've been inside the walls of
NLA the entire time since coming
here, you see. I didn't know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0033
rows.name:
I took a bit of a tumble, but
Staccata is a doctor, after all!
I patched myself right up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0034
rows.name:
So, how did it go? Were you able to acquire
the Assassin Springtail on your end?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0035
rows.name:
Amazing, thank you so much! Just
what I'd expect from a BLADE![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0036
rows.name:
...Now, Fraisie! Hand over the
"Miracle Water" to Staccata![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0037
rows.name:
This is undeniably an Assassin Springtail.
I'm surprised you managed to get it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0038
rows.name:
...Very well. I made a promise,
so it cannot be helped.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0039
rows.name:
Here... You have no further business with the
church, correct? I ask that faithless Ma-non
like yourself never approach here again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0040
rows.name:
So this is the "Miracle Water," is it.
It looks just like normal water...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0041
rows.name:
*Lick*... This taste,
just as I thought...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0042
rows.name:
...Staccata will take a little time
to investigate this "Miracle Water."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0043
rows.name:
Please go to the Biahno Water
Purification Plant and see if
there is anything suspicious there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0044
rows.name:
If we find another piece of
evidence there, we will surely
be able to corner Fraisie![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev025801_MSG0045
rows.name:
Let's meet back around here
once we are both finished![ST:wait ]
